title: Generate unique test data with Ecto.UUID
prompt: A test module creates users with `email: "test@example.com"` — hard-coded, causing unique-constraint collisions across concurrent async tests. Rewrite a single test at `test/my_app/accounts_test.exs` to use `email: "user_#{Ecto.UUID.generate()}@example.com"` so each concurrent test generates a unique email. Use `Ecto.UUID.generate/0`.
tier_rationale: Pattern swap with named target generator.
research_citation: "If your data should be unique, make it unique across all tests" — AppSignal
